channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news from regional and specialist sources

item.title: 🇮🇱⛪ Israeli soldiers jailed for desecrating Virgin Mary statue in Lebanon
item.description: Two Israeli soldiers disciplined after one placed a cigarette in a Virgin Mary statue's mouth while the other photographed the act, drawing condemnation as an "anti-Christian" incident.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚖️ Zelensky's former chief of staff Yermak charged in major corruption probe
item.description: Andriy Yermak, who served as President Zelensky's second-in-command, faces corruption charges in a significant investigation that could reshape Ukrainian politics.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇰🇵💰 Russia paid North Korea up to $13.8 billion for war support
item.description: South Korean intelligence estimates North Korea earned $13-13.8 billion from Russia for weapons and soldiers, revealing unprecedented military cooperation between the two nations.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇩🇪🤝 Ukraine and Germany sign defense cooperation agreement, plan joint drone production
item.description: Germany and Ukraine launch "Brave Germany" initiative to advance defense technologies and support innovative startups, deepening bilateral military cooperation.

item.title: 🇱🇻💥 Ukrainian drone strike on Baltic fuel depot prompts Latvian government resignation
item.description: A Ukrainian drone strike on an empty fuel depot in Latvia, caused by Russian GPS spoofing of Ukrainian drones, has led to a top-level resignation in the Latvian government.

item.title: 🇬🇧🇷🇺 UK sanctions 85 people and entities over pro-Kremlin narratives
item.description: The sanctions target individuals and organisations thought to have helped Russia forcibly deport and militarise Ukrainian children.

item.title: 🇨🇳🚢 China tightens grip on global shipbuilding, grabbing 85% of new orders
item.description: Chinese shipbuilders secured the vast majority of new vessel orders as the country consolidates its dominance in the maritime industry.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇩🇪 German Defense Minister visits Kyiv to discuss arms production
item.description: Germany's defense chief travels to Ukraine to discuss expanding military production and cooperation.

item.title: 🇨🇦🇹🇷 Canada eyes Turkey as a fellow mid-power ally in weapons development
item.description: Canada looks for lessons in Turkey's effort to nurse a homegrown industrial ecosystem for making vital defense equipment, a senior Canadian official said.

item.title: 🌿 Natural rubber prices soar on Iran tensions, boosting Asian suppliers
item.description: Supply chain concerns over Middle East tensions drive up rubber commodity prices across Asian markets.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇸🇾 EU agrees to restore full trade ties with Syria
item.description: The European Union moves to normalize economic relations with Syria after years of sanctions.

item.title: 🇮🇱⚖️ Israel pushes for death penalty and show trials for Oct 7 detainees
item.description: Israeli government advocates for harsh measures against those detained in connection with the October 7 attacks.

item.title: 🇹🇼🇨🇳 Taiwan civilians sharpen self-defence skills ahead of Trump-Xi summit
item.description: Taiwanese citizens train in combat readiness as tensions rise before the anticipated US-China summit.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇺🇦 EU rejects Putin's call for Gerhard Schroeder role in Ukraine peace talks
item.description: European officials dismiss the Russian president's suggestion that the former German chancellor mediate negotiations.

item.title: 🇺🇸⛽ Trump federal gas tax proposal amid Iran war
item.description: The administration considers fuel tax adjustments as geopolitical tensions affect energy markets.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 'Playing games': Trump calls Iran's response to US peace proposal 'unacceptable'
item.description: Both sides remain far apart as Tehran demands war reparations and control of the Strait of Hormuz, according to Iran state TV.

item.title: 🇮🇱⚔️ Netanyahu says war 'not over' until Iran's uranium is physically removed
item.description: Israeli leader says nuclear material must be 'taken out', as US-Iran ceasefire remains tenuous.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Ukraine and Russia trade blame for breaking US-brokered ceasefire
item.description: Attacks reported on the second day of what was supposed to have been a three-day truce announced by Trump.

item.title: 🇵🇱⚖️ Poland's ex-minister facing prosecution travels from Hungary to US
item.description: Former Justice minister Zbigniew Ziobro faces prosecution for alleged abuse of power.

item.title: 🇬🇧🏛️ Under-threat UK PM Starmer vows to prove 'doubters' wrong
item.description: Starmer has failed to spur economic growth and has swerved from one policy misstep to another.

item.title: 🇬🇧🏝️ UK paratroopers jump onto remote Atlantic island for hantavirus mission
item.description: UK forces carry out first-ever deployment of medical personnel via parachute to reach isolated Tristan da Cunha.

item.title: 🇨🇦🔍 Canada's spy report hints at India reset despite meddling claims
item.description: A Canadian spy report validates New Delhi's concerns about Sikh extremism, even as it accuses India of foreign interference and espionage.

item.title: 🇮🇱🗳️ Israel's election may end the Netanyahu era but not the 'forever wars'
item.description: After nearly two decades and six terms in office, Israel's prime minister could be on his way out. But little looks likely to change.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸💼 Trump-Xi summit hides simmering trade tensions under the surface
item.description: Despite declarations of cooperation, friendship and respect from both sides, major trade conflict is brewing between the two superpowers.
